name: Audrey's Oriental Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken breasts into thin strips.
2. In a medium bowl, combine the brown sugar and cornstarch. Gradually stir in the vinegar and soy sauce.
3. Stir in the onion rings and green pepper until well mixed.
4. Heat oil in a wok.
5. Add the chicken strips to the hot oil and stir fry, just until tender and the chicken has turned white.
6. Add the pineapple and vegetable mixture; stir until well combined.
7. Cover and simmer over low heat for 15 minutes.
